text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has been selected to be Umamusume
of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Umamusume of the Year?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, Brian! Perfect timing! Allow me to explain.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That title is bestowed upon the racer with the
highest accolades.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There is also an award ceremony, so please
glance through these documents regarding
attendance.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm sure the ceremony will be a huge
milestone for you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, do we really have to go?
choice_data_list: Well, technically, we could skip, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm not a fan of things like this, and I'd like
to avoid any unnecessary annoyances.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I want to focus on right now is
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I've heard that strong runners who've won in the
past will also be in attendance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that being able to see them up close and
hear how they think will have a positive impact on
her running. Not to mention...
choice_data_list: Going will motivate you to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Mmm...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's a hard opportunity to pass up. Fine then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's your duty to make me stronger. I'll leave it to
you to guide me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's the deal I signed up for, so you won't hear
any complaints from me. Pick whatever path you
think I need.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is an important decision that will affect her
future. Should we look to rub shoulders with
seasoned racers... or not? The best choice is...
choice_data_list:
You want to face off with the best, so let's
attend!
Maybe it's a little too soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh, all right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm with you. Let's move to the arena where
the strongest fight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we give notice that Narita Brian will be
attending.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm still nothing more than a competitor. It's too
early for me to move to the next level.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm not even sure I understand what strength is
yet anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we give notice that Narita Brian won't be
attending.
